user.title: Set up Railboard
user.description: What would you like to add?

rail.title: Find a rail station
rail.description:
Search for a UK station by name.

Sign up for a free refresh token at: https://api-portal.rtt.io (requires an RTT unified login account)

rail_select.title: Choose your station
rail_select.description: Select the station you want to follow.

bus.title: Find a bus stop
bus.description:
Search for a bus stop by name or postcode.

A TfL API key is optional but recommended - get one for free at: https://api-portal.tfl.gov.uk/

bus_select.title: Choose your bus stop
bus_select.description: Select the bus stop you want to follow.

bus_routes.title: Choose bus routes
bus_routes.description: Select which routes at {stop_name} to follow. Leave empty to follow all routes at this stop.

journey.title: Combine stations/stops into a journey
journey.description: Pick two or more already-configured rail stations or bus stops. The journey sensor shows whichever option currently gets you there soonest.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Please check your credentials/details and try again.
error.no_stops_found: Nothing found for that search. Try a different name.
error.need_two_legs: Pick at least two stations/stops to combine.

abort.already_configured: This station, bus stop, or journey is already configured
abort.no_legs_available: You need at least two configured rail stations or bus stops before you can create a journey.

init.title: Railboard Options
init.description: Configure display options for your departure board

data.filter_destination: Only show next-train results for trains calling at this station code (optional, e.g. RDG)
data.max_bus_results: Maximum number of buses to show
data.tracked_time: Track a specific scheduled departure time (optional, e.g. 08:03)
data.show_first_last_train: Show first/last train of the day sensors

abort.no_options: Journey entries have no configurable options.
